title: Orthopaedic physiotherapy
description: Physiotherapy for post-operative recovery, ligament reconstruction, spinal conditions, and orthopaedic injuries.
longDescription: Orthopaedic physiotherapy focuses on the assessment and treatment of musculoskeletal conditions, including injuries, post-operative recovery, joint problems, spinal conditions, and soft tissue disorders. Treatment is individually tailored and may include manual therapy, movement assessment, and exercise-based rehabilitation to restore mobility, strength, and function.
